plan.description: Read package.json and all source files. Identify vulnerable dependencies: axios 0.21.1 (CVE, update to 1.6.0) and lodash 4.17.20 (prototype pollution fix in 4.17.21). Check if API patterns are compatible with new versions.
Update both dependencies in package.json (axios→1.6.0, lodash→4.17.21). Write CHANGELOG.md documenting the security updates.

initialState.task: Scan and update vulnerable dependencies in a Node.js project. Focus on security-relevant updates.

assertions.description: Old axios version should be gone
